Document:
# Core Rules These rules apply at all times, including between rounds.
- [textlink="1. Admins have final say" link="RuleC1-Carpmosia"] - [textlink="2. Don't be a dick" link="RuleC2-Carpmosia"] - [textlink="3. No Hate Speech or Discriminatory Language" link="RuleC3-Carpmosia"] - [textlink="4. No sexual content/themes, including erotic roleplay (ERP) and no shock content" link="RuleC4-Carpmosia"] - [textlink="5. Do not use out of game methods to communicate with other players" link="RuleC5-Carpmosia"] - [textlink="6. Do not attempt to evade bans" link="RuleC6-Carpmosia"] - [textlink="7. Only use English" link="RuleC7-Carpmosia"] - [textlink="8. Do not exploit the game, use cheats, or macros" link="RuleC8-Carpmosia"] - [textlink="9. Do not use multiple accounts, or alt accounts, and do not share accounts" link="RuleC9-Carpmosia"] - [textlink="10. Do not abuse or ignore admin messages" link="RuleC10-Carpmosia"] - [textlink="11. Do not threaten to ahelp other players or argue with them about rules" link="RuleC11-Carpmosia"] - [textlink="12. Players must be and act at least 17 years old" link="RuleC12-Carpmosia"] - [textlink="13. Use realistic character names, and do not use names of famous people" link="RuleC13-Carpmosia"] - [textlink="14. Do not use LOOC or OOC to share current round information" link="RuleC14-Carpmosia"]
